name: cc
description: Use Claude Code from Codex to review code or delegate coding tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate review and coding tasks to Claude Code
interface.longDescription: Lets Codex call the local Claude Code CLI to review changes (read-only) or delegate coding tasks (write-capable), with foreground and background jobs.
defaultPrompt: Have Claude Code review my current diff.
Have Claude Code run an adversarial review of this design.
Delegate this bug fix to Claude Code.
